summary: 9 film announcements, 6 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Renegades
film.talent: Jonathan Goldstein and John Francis Daley (directors)
film.announcement: Sony Pictures acquired the short story 'Renegades' by Will Simmons with Goldstein and Daley set to helm the feature adaptation of the action-thriller.

film.title: The Bell Jar
film.announcement: Ella Beatty is in final talks to join Focus Features' adaptation of The Bell Jar.

film.title: Herbert West: Reanimator
film.announcement: First look released at Joseph Morgan and Katie Cassidy in the fantasy horror film adapted from H.P. Lovecraft's story.

film.title: Hollow
film.talent: Sydney Sweeney (star), Lindsey Anderson Beer (writer/director), LuckyChap (producer)
film.announcement: Sony lands the 'Sleepy Hollow' package 'Hollow' with Sydney Sweeney starring, Lindsey Anderson Beer writing and directing, and LuckyChap producing.

film.title: Mini War
film.talent: Brett Gelman, Kevin Nealon, Rob Morgan
film.announcement: Brett Gelman, Kevin Nealon, and Rob Morgan join the cast of the comedy 'Mini War'.

film.title: How The Cookie Crumbles
film.talent: Giorgia Whigham, Trevor Wallace, Alyssa Milano, Shea Whigham
film.announcement: Giorgia Whigham, Trevor Wallace, Alyssa Milano, and Shea Whigham lead the R-rated comedy 'How The Cookie Crumbles'.

film.title: Kaet Might Die
film.talent: Jimmi Simpson, Ben Wang, Zosia Mamet
film.announcement: Jimmi Simpson, Ben Wang, and Zosia Mamet join Mercedes Bryce Morgan's dark comedy 'Kaet Might Die'.

film.title: The Drill
film.announcement: Rowan Blanchard stars in the school shooting-themed dark comedy 'The Drill' from director Millicent Hailes.

film.title: If I Tell You
film.announcement: Suncatcher Productions acquired distribution rights to Tessa Blake's 'If I Tell You' starring Carol Kane.

tv.title: Thunder Road
tv.announcement: West Duchovny joins AMC's NASCAR drama series 'Thunder Road'.

tv.title: This Summer Will Be Different
tv.announcement: Roby Attal and Francesca Reale join Netflix's 'This Summer Will Be Different' as Felix and Bridget.

tv.title: Bender
tv.talent: Bill Burr, Chris O'Dowd, Ruari Spooner
tv.announcement: Ruari Spooner joins Bill Burr and Chris O'Dowd in the comedy 'Bender'.

tv.title: God of War
tv.announcement: Prime Video's 'God of War' series recasts the Kratos role following Ryan Hurst's on-set injury.

tv.title: Jakarta
tv.announcement: Iko Uwais and director Albert Hughes unite for the multi-generational crime series 'Jakarta' at Alcon Entertainment.

tv.title: Queenstown
tv.announcement: Netflix unveils 'Queenstown', its first new New Zealand series.
